title: tubella notosibirica
side_effects: Tubella notosibirica can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory issues. In severe cases, improper use can lead to liver damage, kidney failure, and even organ toxicity. Some individuals may experience dizziness, nausea, and headaches due to the plant's toxic compounds. Additionally, consuming the plant can cause gastrointestinal problems, including diarrhea and stomach ulcers.
